title: Better Fireworks Particles
description: Don't you hate how blinding firework rockets are in PvP?  Here's your vanilla+ solution!
body:
# Better Firework Particles
### Description

**Don't you just hate how impossible it is to see anything during PvP when fireworks are involved? Well fear no more!**

**This texturepack shrinks down the firework blast textures to be much easier to see, while still keeping them visible and textured!**



## Here are some examples;

* `Vanilla`
![Vanilla Firework Particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53b44f70f3999b90caf38e2a2f0f7b7cddfd9006.png)

* `Better Firework Particles`
![Better Firework Particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d3c917784843eca07e523c38fd4ac04c15a8502.png)

* `Vanilla`
![Vanilla Up-close](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d6cc387262b01d1972c84ad8f2c9c606b94683e.png)

* `Better Firework Particles`
![Better Up-close](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41d8fb89bf8a6deb068ca52a724f67116a51e91e.png)



## If you have any issues, message "avaasusual." on Discord!
**Alternatively, you can look me up in the [Modrinth Discord](https://discord.gg/modrinth)!**
